questions.enonce: Which tense is used for an action that happened at a specific time in the past ?
We use 'since' for a duration (ex: since three years).
Complete: I {{1}} (live) in New York for ten years now, and I love it.

questions.question: Match the sentence to its meaning.

pairs.right: The action is finished, I don't live there anymore.
The action has a link with the present (maybe I still live there).

questions.enonce: Choose the correct form: 'She ________ to the USA in 2015.'
